params.SpellDescription: Incubate X twice, where X is the number of lands you control. (To incubate X, create an incubator token with X +1/+1 counters on it and "{2}: Transform this artifact." It transforms into a 0/0 Phyrexian artifact creature.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Incubate X twice, where X is the number of lands you control. (To incubate X, create an incubator token with X +1/+1 counters on it and "{2}: Transform this artifact." It transforms into a 0/0 Phyrexian artifact creature.)
